disclaimer: Hardware fault log entries are operational provenance records — a hardware fault record does not modify candidate scores or pathway routing, does not authorize external submission, and does not constitute a detection claim.

entries.notes: CPU thermal throttling detected on compute node 01. Temperature exceeds nominal threshold.
SMART errors detected on storage array 02 disk bay 4. Predictive failure alert raised.
ECC memory errors diagnosed on compute node 03 DIMM slot B2. Replacement ordered.
Power supply unit fault on rack PDU 05 repaired. Redundant PSU replaced and tested.
Intermittent link flap on core switch 01 port 24. Deferred pending maintenance window.
